purpose: Minimal operator handoff for the next Noor first-subscriber sprint action.

executionState.headline: Noor subscriber signal is observed; review readiness before more outreach.
canDoNow: Run the anonymous 7-day and 30-day event report.
Run the Noor sprint review and keep only aggregate evidence.
Prepare a Noor subscriber readiness review without sending a newsletter yet.
waitingFor: Noor subscriber list readiness confirmation before newsletter changes.
Aggregate attribution review before marking a new outreach day complete.
mustNotDo: Do not send a Noor newsletter while readiness is safe_wait_subscriber_empty.
Do not add payment, price, checkout, or product purchase language.
Do not record email, name, phone, address, subscriber IDs, or MailerLite IDs.

sprint.goal: Get the first real Noor subscriber signal without sending a newsletter or enabling checkout.

nextAction.label: Noor readiness review
nextAction.action: Review Noor subscriber readiness and aggregate attribution before running more outreach.
nextAction.expectedSignal: Existing Noor submit success aggregate evidence remains non-identifying and should be reviewed before new outreach is marked complete.

localizedCopy.en: A Noor subscriber signal has already been observed. Review readiness before attributing new outreach or sending a newsletter.

nextAction.copy: A Noor subscriber signal has already been observed. Review readiness before attributing new outreach or sending a newsletter.

operatorChecklist.label: Copy the planned parent note
operatorChecklist.action: Use the Arabic parent copy from the next-action handoff without adding price, checkout, or payment language.
operatorChecklist.evidence: The shared message contains the planned tracked Fursay link and no personal subscriber data.

operatorChecklist.label: Open the tracked link before sharing
operatorChecklist.action: Open the primary link once and confirm it lands on the Noor story pack or sample preview with the expected source_id and placement.
operatorChecklist.evidence: The URL remains on fursay.com and keeps the planned source_id, creator, and placement attribution.

operatorChecklist.label: Record the posted state
operatorChecklist.action: Do not record a new posted outreach day until the Noor readiness review is complete.
operatorChecklist.evidence: The current log already has an aggregate subscriber signal; avoid attributing it to a new unposted placement.

operatorChecklist.label: Review anonymous aggregate results
operatorChecklist.evidence: Use noor_growth_signals_7d or the listed report query; record signal evidence only as aggregate counts, never names or emails.

privacy.boundary: Record anonymous aggregate evidence only; do not store email, name, phone, address, subscriber IDs, or MailerLite IDs.
